text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I run into Meisho Doto in the hallway as she's
letting out a long and deep sigh.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Sigh... Why am I such a mess?

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Oh, T-Trainer... It's nothing serious, only that my
skin has started feeling a little patchy...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
It must be because yesterday I mistook the
sesame oil for soy sauce... and put it on my side
dish.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
But then my hand slipped... turning my vegetables
into sesame oil soup.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I suppose she was against throwing the dish away.
Her skin trouble and latest blunder leave Meisho
Doto in a slump.
